retry_reason: Put operations are unconditional and always succeed; retrying would cause a double-put, which is a use-after-free bug.
contract_summary: Releases a reference to an auxiliary device by calling auxiliary_device_uninit. After this call, the auxiliary device's reference count is decremented, and if it reaches zero, the device will be freed. The caller must not use the data pointer after this call. This function is a put wrapper used to clean up a reference obtained earlier.
